name: Robot Mower V&V Decomposition
description: A Bayesian Belief Network decomposing the verification and validation of a robot mower software system. Each node represents a V&V activity or confidence assertion, with the probability of it being satisfactorily completed. Causality flows from root development factors (Layer 1) through component verification (Layer 2), integration testing (Layer 3), system validation (Layer 4) to top-level V&V confidence (Layer 5).

nodes.label: Requirements Quality
nodes.description: Completeness and correctness of system requirements specification

nodes.label: Requirements Traceability
nodes.description: Ability to trace requirements through design, implementation, and test

nodes.label: Team Expertise
nodes.description: Domain knowledge and software engineering skill of the development team

nodes.label: Process Maturity
nodes.description: Maturity of the software development lifecycle process (e.g. CMMI, ASPICE)

nodes.label: Toolchain Quality
nodes.description: Quality and qualification of compilers, static analyzers, and CI/CD tools

nodes.label: Test Infrastructure
nodes.description: Availability of simulators, HIL rigs, and field test environments

nodes.label: Safety Culture
nodes.description: Organizational commitment to functional safety practices

nodes.label: Regulatory Knowledge
nodes.description: Understanding of IEC 62443, ISO 13482, machinery directive requirements

nodes.label: Architecture Quality
nodes.description: Quality of software/system architecture and separation of concerns

nodes.label: Configuration Management
nodes.description: Effectiveness of version control, build reproducibility, and change tracking

nodes.label: Supplier Quality
nodes.description: Quality of third-party components: RTOS, sensor drivers, motor controllers

nodes.label: Hazard Analysis
nodes.description: Completeness of HARA and fault tree analysis for the mower system

nodes.label: Coding Standards
nodes.description: Adherence to MISRA-C / CERT-C and project coding guidelines

nodes.label: Review Process
nodes.description: Effectiveness of code reviews, design reviews, and safety reviews

nodes.label: Documentation Quality
nodes.description: Quality of design documents, interface specs, and user manuals

nodes.label: Navigation Unit Tests
nodes.description: Unit test coverage and pass rate for path planning and localization modules

nodes.label: Navigation Static Analysis
nodes.description: Static analysis results for navigation code (no critical warnings)

nodes.label: Blade Control Unit Tests
nodes.description: Unit test results for blade motor control, speed regulation, and emergency stop

nodes.label: Blade Control Static Analysis
nodes.description: Static analysis of blade controller code for memory safety and timing

nodes.label: Obstacle Detection Unit Tests
nodes.description: Unit tests for ultrasonic, lidar, and bumper sensor fusion algorithms

nodes.label: Obstacle ML Model Verification
nodes.description: Verification of ML obstacle classifier accuracy, robustness, and edge cases

nodes.label: Battery Mgmt Unit Tests
nodes.description: Unit tests for battery monitoring, charging logic, and low-voltage shutdown

nodes.label: Communications Unit Tests
nodes.description: Unit tests for WiFi/BLE app interface, OTA update, and cloud telemetry

nodes.label: Comms Security Testing
nodes.description: Penetration testing and fuzz testing of communication interfaces

nodes.label: RTOS Verification
nodes.description: Verification of RTOS configuration, task priorities, and deadline guarantees

nodes.label: Motor Driver Verification
nodes.description: Verification of wheel and blade motor driver interfaces and fault handling

nodes.label: Safety Monitor Unit Tests
nodes.description: Unit tests for the independent safety monitoring subsystem and watchdog

nodes.label: Boundary Mapping Tests
nodes.description: Verification of virtual boundary detection, RTK-GPS fence, and wire following

nodes.label: Power Management Tests
nodes.description: Tests for sleep modes, scheduled operation, and power fault recovery

nodes.label: Rain/Tilt Sensor Tests
nodes.description: Verification of rain detection and tilt/lift sensor interrupt handling

nodes.label: Diagnostics & Logging Tests
nodes.description: Unit tests for onboard diagnostics, error logging, and remote log upload

nodes.label: Firmware Update Tests
nodes.description: Verification of OTA update integrity checks, rollback, and brick protection

nodes.label: Code Coverage Analysis
nodes.description: Statement, branch, and MC/DC coverage metrics across all modules

nodes.label: Requirements Coverage
nodes.description: Percentage of requirements with linked and passing test cases

nodes.label: Architecture Conformance
nodes.description: Verification that implementation conforms to documented architecture

nodes.label: Navigation Integration
nodes.description: Integration testing of GPS + IMU + wheel odometry sensor fusion pipeline

nodes.label: Blade Safety Integration
nodes.description: Integration of blade control with safety monitor, lift sensor, and obstacle detection

nodes.label: Obstacle Detection Integration
nodes.description: End-to-end obstacle detection pipeline: sensors → fusion → classification → stop

nodes.label: Communications Integration
nodes.description: Integration of app control, cloud telemetry, and OTA update subsystems

nodes.label: Power System Integration
nodes.description: Integration of battery management, charging, motor power, and sleep modes

nodes.label: RTOS Task Integration
nodes.description: Verification of all RTOS tasks running together: timing, priority inversion, deadlocks

nodes.label: Sensor Fusion Validation
nodes.description: Validation that fused sensor data meets accuracy requirements in varied conditions

nodes.label: HIL Navigation Testing
nodes.description: Hardware-in-the-loop testing of navigation with real GPS/IMU on simulated terrain

nodes.label: HIL Blade Control Testing
nodes.description: HIL testing of blade motor control under varying grass/load conditions

nodes.label: HIL Obstacle Detection
nodes.description: HIL testing with real sensors and physical obstacle fixtures

nodes.label: Simulated Full Mow Cycle
nodes.description: Simulation of complete mowing cycle: undock → mow → return → dock

nodes.label: Fault Injection Testing
nodes.description: Systematic fault injection: sensor failures, communication loss, power glitches

nodes.label: Stress & Endurance Testing
nodes.description: Extended operation tests: 48h continuous, extreme temperatures, wet grass

nodes.label: Regression Test Suite
nodes.description: Automated regression suite covering all previously found defects

nodes.label: Interface Compatibility
nodes.description: Testing of all external interfaces: charging dock, app versions, cloud API versions

nodes.label: EMC Pre-compliance Testing
nodes.description: Pre-compliance electromagnetic compatibility testing of electronics

nodes.label: Cybersecurity Assessment
nodes.description: Security assessment per IEC 62443: threat modeling, vulnerability scanning

nodes.label: Safety Requirements Validation
nodes.description: Validation that all safety requirements from HARA are implemented and tested

nodes.label: MISRA Compliance Check
nodes.description: Full MISRA-C compliance analysis with deviation justifications documented

nodes.label: Diagnostics Integration
nodes.description: Integration of diagnostics with cloud monitoring and mobile app alerts

nodes.label: Multi-Zone Navigation Test
nodes.description: Testing of multi-zone mowing with passage navigation between areas

nodes.label: Edge Cutting Validation
nodes.description: Validation of boundary edge-cutting accuracy and consistency

nodes.label: Slope Handling Validation
nodes.description: Validation of safe operation on slopes up to rated maximum gradient

nodes.label: Child & Pet Safety Tests
nodes.description: Testing of object detection and emergency stop for children and pets

nodes.label: Weather Resilience Testing
nodes.description: Validation of operation in rain, wet grass, and automatic weather-based scheduling

nodes.label: Suburban Field Trial
nodes.description: Field trials in typical suburban gardens: varied shapes, obstacles, slopes

nodes.label: Complex Garden Field Trial
nodes.description: Field trials in complex gardens: narrow passages, multiple zones, many obstacles

nodes.label: Adverse Weather Field Trial
nodes.description: Field trials during rain, dawn/dusk lighting, and temperature extremes

nodes.label: User Acceptance Testing
nodes.description: Beta testing with real users evaluating mowing quality, app usability, and reliability

nodes.label: Blade Safety Case
nodes.description: Safety case argument for blade-related hazards: contact, throw, entanglement

nodes.label: Navigation Safety Case
nodes.description: Safety case for navigation hazards: boundary breach, collision, getting lost

nodes.label: Electrical Safety Case
nodes.description: Safety case for electrical hazards: battery thermal runaway, charging faults

nodes.label: Cybersecurity Safety Case
nodes.description: Assurance argument that cyber threats cannot cause physical harm

nodes.label: Functional Safety Package
nodes.description: Complete functional safety documentation per ISO 13482 / IEC 61508

nodes.label: Software Quality Report
nodes.description: Overall software quality metrics: defect density, coverage, complexity

nodes.label: Performance Validation
nodes.description: Validation of KPIs: mowing time, area coverage, battery life, GPS accuracy

nodes.label: Reliability Validation
nodes.description: MTBF analysis and validation from extended field operation data

nodes.label: Maintainability Validation
nodes.description: Validation of firmware update, diagnostics, and repair procedures

nodes.label: EMC Formal Certification
nodes.description: Formal EMC testing at accredited lab per EN 55014 and EN 61000

nodes.label: Noise Level Certification
nodes.description: Acoustic noise testing per outdoor machinery directive 2000/14/EC

nodes.label: Product Safety Testing
nodes.description: Testing per IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-107 for robotic mowers

nodes.label: SIL Assessment
nodes.description: Safety Integrity Level assessment and verification for safety functions

nodes.label: Penetration Test Report
nodes.description: Independent third-party penetration test of mower and cloud infrastructure

nodes.label: Traceability Audit
nodes.description: Complete bidirectional traceability: requirements ↔ design ↔ code ↔ tests

nodes.label: Software Release Review
nodes.description: Formal review gate: all verification criteria met before release candidate

nodes.label: OTA Rollout Validation
nodes.description: Validation of staged OTA rollout process: canary → phased → full fleet

nodes.label: GDPR/Data Privacy Check
nodes.description: Verification of data privacy: GPS tracks, usage data, cloud storage policies

nodes.label: User Manual Review
nodes.description: Review of user manual for safety warnings, setup instructions, and accuracy

nodes.label: Installer Certification
nodes.description: Validation of professional installer training materials and procedures

nodes.label: Fleet Management Validation
nodes.description: Validation of multi-mower fleet management for commercial deployments

nodes.label: Blade Hazards Mitigated
nodes.description: Confidence that all blade-related hazards are adequately mitigated

nodes.label: Navigation Hazards Mitigated
nodes.description: Confidence that boundary breach and collision risks are controlled

nodes.label: Electrical Safety Verified
nodes.description: Confidence in electrical safety: battery, charging, EMC

nodes.label: Cybersecurity Verified
nodes.description: Confidence that the system is resilient to cyber attacks

nodes.label: Functional Correctness
nodes.description: Confidence that the mower performs its intended function correctly

nodes.label: Reliability & Durability
nodes.description: Confidence in long-term reliable operation in the field

nodes.label: Maintainability Assured
nodes.description: Confidence in field updateability, diagnostics, and serviceability

nodes.label: Regulatory Compliance
nodes.description: Readiness for CE marking, type approval, and market access

nodes.label: Safety Case Complete
nodes.description: Overall safety case accepted by internal safety board

nodes.label: Software Release Ready
nodes.description: Software meets all release criteria and quality gates

nodes.label: Field Validation Complete
nodes.description: All field trial acceptance criteria met across scenarios

nodes.label: Commercial Readiness
nodes.description: Product ready for commercial launch: packaging, support, documentation

nodes.label: Child Safety Assured
nodes.description: Specific confidence in safety around children per ISO 13482

nodes.label: System V&V Complete
nodes.description: Overall V&V verdict: the robot mower system is verified and validated

nodes.label: Market Approval Granted
nodes.description: Regulatory type approval and CE marking obtained for target markets
